# Agent Workflow

This workflow is explicit opt-in. Do not apply it by default. Only apply it when the user explicitly asks for this workflow or names it in chat.

For reflective learning after meaningful work:

1. Review recent work, decisions, and verification.
2. Classify durable facts, current state, session outcome, and reusable lessons.
3. Update `.superpowers-memory/` files when they exist.
4. Keep stable context separate from temporary notes.
